descriptionShort: Vernon Lakers defeat defending champion Richmond Sockeyes 6-2 in BCJHL league final Game 3.
descriptionLong: The defending B.C. Junior Hockey League champion Richmond Sockeyes were defeated 6-2 by the Interior Division champion Vernon Lakers at Richmond Arena on March 22, 1988. Vernon leads the best-of-seven league final 3-0 and could clinch the series in Game 4 that evening in Richmond. The Lakers displayed swift skating and passing prowess in their dominant performance.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Face Elimination as Vernon Lakers Dominate BCJHL Final
